title: Chemin Esports Ultimate Showdown
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Chemin Esports Ultimate Showdown}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Chemin Esports Ultimate Showdown |icon= |tickername=CES EUS |shortname=CEUS |image=CES Ultimate Showdown.png |type=Online |team_number=20 |series=CES Ultimate Showdown |organizer=Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/villageresports/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/cheminesports/ Chemin Esports] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-16 |edate=2021-09-18 |facebook=Chemin-Esports-110848534511713 |instagram=cheminesports |youtube=c/CheminEsports |twitter= |discord= }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/cheminesports/ Chemin Esports]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/villageresports/ Villager Esports]''' present a BGMI invitational tournament called the '''''Chemin Esports Ultimate Showdown''''' with a prize pool of ₹1,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Spero |b1flag=in|b1name=Piyush Bathla |b2=SardarjiYT |b2flag=in|b2name=Harshdeep Singh }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Chemin Esports Ultimate Showdown:''' 16th September 2021 to 18th September 2021.'' * ''20 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]]'' * ''12 Matches to be played over a period of 3 days.'' * ''4 Matches to be played each day.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''3 Matchdays: 4 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>M ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-16}}||1 |- |{{Placement|17-20}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ₹1,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $1359 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
